reported_symbol_semantics.C0: initial glucose concentration in culture medium
reported_symbol_semantics.Vt: remaining culture-medium volume at time t
reported_symbol_semantics.VF: volumetric factor of the considered spheroids

limitations: The reported 100 uL is the cell-culture seeding volume; Methods 2.7 does not restate the initial medium volume after the glucose-challenge medium change.
The remaining-volume schedule, volumetric factor and viable cell count at each observation window are not numerically identified in the primary paper.
Cumulative means can be derived from the three non-overlapping window means by linearity, but their combined SD cannot be reconstructed without covariance or repeated-measures structure.
The 0-72 h records overlap the three shorter windows and are retained as descriptive internal consistency audits, not independent validation targets.
Net medium glucose disappearance cannot be decomposed into uptake, utilization and production without additional tracer-resolved measurements.
